'''Bodwae''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Laerdocian]] who worked as a sensor officer on the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' as of [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. He spoke with his [[Species/Legends|species]]' characteristic accent, inserting J's before I's so that, for example, "ship going to get hit" became "shjip gojing to get hjit." He continued to serve as sensor officer during the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Yaga Minor]], when the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was briefly under the command of [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]].

{{Char-stub}}
